name: freeride
description: Unlimited free AI access for NanoClaw via OpenRouter's free models with automatic fallback switching
author: Shaishav Pidadi

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Your OpenRouter API key (get free at openrouter.ai/keys)

install: npx clawhub@latest install freeride && cd /home/node/.claude/workspace/skills/free-ride && pip install -e .
